<thought>
I am currently at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). My goal is to reach the cell with the 'G' (goal) at row 04 column D.

From there, I need to move forward again to avoid the lava at row 03 column C. After moving forward, I will be at row 03 column C facing right. Now, I need to turn left to face down (`v`) and then move forward twice to reach the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
